nasb.text: Because in much wisdom there is much grief, and increasing knowledge results in increasing pain.

esv.text: For in much wisdom is much vexation, and he who increases knowledge increases sorrow.

cnv.text: 因為多有智慧，就多有煩惱；加增知識，就加增痛苦。

ccb.text: 因为智慧越高，愁烦越多；知识越多，痛苦越深。

csbs.text: 要知道，智慧增多，烦恼也增多； 知识增添，痛苦也增添。
